description.zh: 图神经网络把神经计算推广到包含节点、边和关系的数据。通过在图上反复传递消息，它们学习节点、边或整个结构的表示。
description.en: Graph neural networks generalized neural computation to data with nodes, edges, and relations. By repeatedly passing messages over a graph, they learned representations for nodes, edges, or whole structures.

role.zh: 2005 年图神经网络论文第一作者
role.en: First author of the 2005 graph neural network paper

name.zh: 加布里埃莱·蒙法尔迪尼

role.zh: 2005 年图神经网络论文共同作者
role.en: Co-author of the 2005 graph neural network paper

role.zh: 2005 年图神经网络论文共同作者
role.en: Co-author of the 2005 graph neural network paper

notes.en: Batch migrated from generated legacy milestone; presentation defaults to preserve-legacy, with claims and source bindings needing later review.
